ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file that was modified */,
  "start_line_new" INTEGER /* The starting line number of the new code */,
  "end_line_new" INTEGER /* The ending line number of the new code */,
  "start_line_old" INTEGER /* The starting line number of the old code */,
  "end_line_old" INTEGER /* The ending line number of the old code */,
  "line_num" INTEGER /* Total number of lines modified */,
  "mod_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., added, deleted) */,
  "mod_description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the modification was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's login name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modification that the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_mod_id FOREIGN KEY ("mod_id") REFERENCES modifications ("mod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_logs" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the build */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date when the build was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Build number */,
  "build_type" TEXT /* Type of build (e.g., nightly, release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modification that triggered the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_mod_id FOREIGN KEY ("mod_id") REFERENCES modifications ("mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the team lead */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being tracked */,
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modification record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action taken */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, modified, deleted) */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_history_mod_id FOREIGN KEY ("mod_id") REFERENCES modifications ("mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file to which the permission applies */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is granted to */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit the file */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view the file */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delete the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " Labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_labels" (
  "file_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file label */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file to which the label is applied */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modification_labels" (
  "mod_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification label */,
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modification to which the label is applied */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modification_labels_mod_id FOREIGN KEY ("mod_id") REFERENCES modifications ("mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the pull request */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the pull request was created */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the pull request was closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_comments" (
  "pull_request_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request comment */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_request_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_comments_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)
